---
title: "Mesure du temps de chaque push"
---

Le script de mesure du temps en Context Manager

```python
from time import perf_counter

class Counter:
    def __enter__(self):
        self.start = perf_counter()
        return self
    
    def __exit__(self, exc_type, exc_val, exc_tb):
        self.end = perf_counter()
        self.elapsed = self.end - self.start
        return self.elapsed
```
